note: Index of domain adapters in loras/domains/. One entry per adapter directory. Used by Bridge A (HivePoA training jobs) to enumerate adapters without filesystem scanning. Update this file whenever an adapter is added, promoted, or archived.

convention.checkpoint_dirs: checkpoint-N/ subdirs are intermediate TRL checkpoints, not separate adapters

adapters.name: cpp-lifetime
adapters.notes: 3 runs inconclusive. Variant damage is structural, not capacity-related. 150 pairs insufficient for broad lift. See cpp_lifetime_adapter_experiments.md.

adapters.name: ts-generics
adapters.notes: +3.3% avg improvement, only 1/5 prompts improved. Pipeline validation only — adapter shelved. See ts_generics_experiment.md.
